================================================================================
  WORKFLOW CAPABILITIES
================================================================================

Validation Pipeline (validate.yml)
  ? PowerShell syntax validation on all .ps1 files
  ? PSScriptAnalyzer code quality analysis
  ? Hardcoded secrets detection (8 regex patterns)
  ? Markdown documentation validation
  ? Comprehensive test suite execution
  ? HTML/JSON report generation
  ? PR comment integration
  ? Artifact upload (30-day retention)

Windows 11 Builder (build-windows-11.yml)
  ? Weekly automated builds (Sunday 2 AM UTC)
  ? Manual dispatch support
  ? Packer template validation
  ? WIM image generation
  ? VHDX variant creation
  ? Boot.wim extraction
  ? Manifest generation with metadata
  ? SHA256 checksum calculation
  ? GitHub release creation
  ? CIS Benchmark Level 2 compliance

Server 2022 Builder (build-server-2022.yml)
  ? Weekly automated builds (Sunday 3 AM UTC)
  ? Matrix build strategy (6 variants)
  ? Edition support (Standard, Datacenter)
  ? Hypervisor variants (Hyper-V, VMware, VirtualBox)
  ? Consolidated manifests
  ? Per-variant artifacts
  ? Unified release creation
  ? Parallel execution (max 2)

Security Audit (security-audit.yml)
  ? Nightly automated scans (1 AM UTC)
  ? PR-based scanning
  ? PowerShell script analysis (PSScriptAnalyzer)
  ? Credential scanning (gitleaks)
  ? SAST pattern detection
  ? SARIF format output
  ? GitHub Security tab integration
  ? PR comment reporting
  ? Hardening effectiveness analysis

Release Publisher (publish-release.yml)
  ? Semantic versioning support
  ? Auto-incrementing releases
  ? Release notes generation
  ? Artifact collection
  ? SHA256 checksum generation
  ? CIS compliance report
  ? Deployment checklist
  ? GitHub release creation
  ? Artifact attachment

Test Deployer (deploy-test.yml)
  ? Multi-environment support (Local, Azure, Hyper-V)
  ? Windows 11 & Server 2022 support
  ? Compliance tests (10 categories)
  ? Security tests (8 vulnerability checks)
  ? HTML report generation
  ? JSON results export
  ? Automated cleanup
  ? Pass rate calculation

================================================================================
  SECURITY FEATURES
================================================================================

Code Quality:
  • PowerShell syntax validation (100% coverage)
  • PSScriptAnalyzer (500+ rules)
  • Code complexity analysis
  • Best practice enforcement

Credential Security:
  • Gitleaks scanning (all commits)
  • Hardcoded secret detection (8 patterns)
  • GitHub Secret vault integration
  • Secret rotation recommendations

SAST Analysis:
  • SQL injection detection
  • Path traversal detection
  • Weak cryptography detection
  • Eval/IEx usage detection
  • Plaintext credential detection

Compliance:
  • CIS Benchmark Level 2 validation
  • Group Policy verification
  • Security policy checks
  • Hardening measure verification

================================================================================
  CONFIGURATION & MANAGEMENT
================================================================================

Centralized Config (config.yml):
  • Workflow triggers & schedules
  • Runner configuration
  • Build parameters
  • ISO source definitions
  • Artifact retention policies
  • Cache strategies
  • Test configuration
  • Security settings
  • Notification setup
  • Release management
  • Compliance settings
  • Performance tuning

Secret Management:
  • AZURE_CREDENTIALS (optional)
  • AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID (optional)
  • SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL (optional)
  • TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL (optional)

Artifact Retention:
  • Test reports: 30 days
  • Build artifacts: 90 days
  • Release artifacts: 180 days
  • Security reports: 30 days
  • Compliance reports: 90 days

================================================================================
  QUICK START STEPS
================================================================================

1. Commit Workflows
   cd /path/to/repo
   git add .github/
   git commit -m "Add comprehensive CI/CD workflows"
   git push

2. Test Validation
   gh workflow run validate.yml
   (Wait 5-15 minutes for completion)

3. Check Results
   gh run view --latest
   gh run download --latest -D artifacts/

4. Configure Optional Secrets (for advanced features)
   gh secret set AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID --body "your-sub-id"
   gh secret set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL --body "your-webhook"

5. Enable Branch Protection
   gh api repos/OWNER/REPO/branches/main/protection \\
     -X PUT \\
     -f required_status_checks.strict=true \\
     -f required_status_checks.contexts='["validate"]'

================================================================================
  WORKFLOW SCHEDULES
================================================================================

Continuous (Every commit/PR):
  • validate.yml - On push to main/develop
  • security-audit.yml - On all PRs

Scheduled:
  • Windows 11 Build - Every Sunday 2:00 AM UTC
  • Server 2022 Build - Every Sunday 3:00 AM UTC
  • Security Audit - Every day 1:00 AM UTC

Manual Dispatch:
  • All workflows support manual triggering
  • Use: gh workflow run <workflow-name>

     - Configuration reference
     - Build parameters
     - Security settings
     - Retention policies

================================================================================
  USAGE EXAMPLES
================================================================================

View Workflow Status:
  gh run list --workflow=validate.yml

Trigger Validation:
  gh workflow run validate.yml

Build Windows 11:
  gh workflow run build-windows-11.yml -f packer_debug="false"

Build Server 2022:
  gh workflow run build-server-2022.yml -f edition="all" -f hypervisor="all"

Run Security Audit:
  gh workflow run security-audit.yml

Create Release:
  gh workflow run publish-release.yml -f release_type="minor"

Test Deployment:
  gh workflow run deploy-test.yml -f test_environment="hyper-v" -f image_type="windows11"

Download Artifacts:
  gh run download RUN_ID -D artifacts/

  VERIFICATION CHECKLIST

Immediate Verification:
  [?] All 7 workflow files created in .github/workflows/
  [?] Configuration file created
  [?] Documentation complete
  [?] YAML syntax valid
  [?] All files readable and accessible

Before Using in Production:
  [ ] Commit files to repository
  [ ] Test on development branch
  [ ] Configure repository settings
  [ ] Set up branch protection rules
  [ ] Configure optional secrets
  [ ] Run initial validation workflow
  [ ] Review first build output
  [ ] Test security audit workflow
  [ ] Validate artifact uploads
  [ ] Test release creation workflow

================================================================================
  SUPPORT & RESOURCES
================================================================================

Documentation:
  - Full Guide: .github/WORKFLOWS.md
  - Implementation: .github/CI_CD_IMPLEMENTATION.md
  - Quick Reference: .github/QUICKREF.md
  - Configuration: .github/workflows/config.yml

External Resources:
  - GitHub Actions: https://docs.github.com/en/actions
  - GitHub CLI: https://cli.github.com/manual/
  - PowerShell: https://docs.microsoft.com/powershell
  - CIS Benchmarks: https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark
  - Packer: https://www.packer.io/docs

Troubleshooting:
  - See WORKFLOWS.md for 8+ common issues
  - Enable debug mode: PACKER_LOG=1, SilentlyContinue="Continue"
  - Check workflow logs: gh run view RUN_ID --log
  - Download logs: gh run download RUN_ID -D logs/

  • Create first release
  • Test deployment workflow

  • Optimize build times
  • Gather metrics for improvements
